title: chromolaena densiflora
intro: Chromolaena densiflora, also known as Eupatorium densiflorum or white crown flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Chromolaena densiflora has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Chromolaena densiflora is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for various health conditions.
